narrative:
Columbia I (precinct in Hamilton County) has 95 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.7 percentage points.
